title: Cerulean
description: Stars, automation, trinkets, and a dream...
body:
I keep having the same dream. A shadow chiseled into a mirror... that's where it all started. Stars billowed around, swirling past me as I reached towards them, never close enough to touch. In their world, in my mind, I was an inconsequential blip. I knew I could harness their power... I've seen what great and terrible things were possible with them. I had to get them for myself. A room, but it's not *my* room: a crude sculpture by a power who knows not how the mind percieves light. Shadows dance across the floors and ceilings. Corridors stretch in impossible places, bathed in an uncanny glow. I think I need to get rid of it.
Mod details... # Cerulean Cerulean is a mod about automation, resources, and the unknown. It adds multi-colored stars which are used to create new items, process vanilla materials, create tools, and automate your dreams. ## Features - A dimension to explore - Another dimension to get there in - Fun gadgets! Move around in style! - Interesting resource puzzles - Decorative blocks to adorn your factory with - Pipes! Rich [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) integration is provided, and is highly reccomended. Getting started is really simple. Put down the painting on a wall near your bed, and go to sleep. The rest will make sense in time. This mod was made for ModFest 1.20.
